s1.ptxt: Warm up engine to normal operating temperature.
Place gear shift lever in “Neutral” and apply parking brake.
Stop engine and turn off all electric switches.
When ignition is “OFF”, connect SUZUKI scan tool to DLC (1).
Run engine at specified idle speed.
Select “MAP” under “Scan Tool Data” mode on scan tool.
Manifold absolute pressure should be within specification.

spec.title: Manifold absolute pressure specification (at sea level)
spec.ptxt: 50 kPa (0.50 kgf/cm2, 7.25 psi, 0.5 bar) or less at specified idle speed

s1.ptxt: Warm up engine to normal operating temperature.
Place gear shift lever in “Neutral” and apply parking brake.
Stop engine and turn off all electric switches.
Remove PCV hose (1) from PCV valve (2).
Connect special tool to PCV hose (1).
Close PCV valve (2) using tape (3) or the like.
Run engine at specified idle speed.
Read vacuum gauge. Vacuum should be within specification.

spec.title: Vacuum specification (at sea level)
spec.ptxt: –50 kPa (–0.50 kgf/cm2, –7.25 psi, –0.5 bar) or less at specified idle speed

s1.ptxt: Disconnect special tool from PCV hose.
Pull off tape from PCV valve.
